text.div:
Generated Narrative: OperationDefinition -s-reindex

URL: [base]/$$reindex

Parameters

UseNameScopeCardinalityTypeBindingDocumentation
INurl0..*string

Optionally provides one ore more relative search parameter URLs (e.g. "Patient?active=true" or "Observation?") that will be reindexed. Note that the URL applies to the resources as they are currently indexed, so you should not use a search parameter that needs reindexing in the URL or some resources may be missed. If no URLs are provided, all resources of all types will be reindexed.

INreindexSearchParameters0..1code

Should search parameters be reindexed (default: ALL)

INoptimizeStorage0..1code

Should we attempt to optimize storage for resources (default: NONE)

INoptimisticLock0..1boolean

Should we attempt to optimistically lock resources being reindexed in order to avoid concurrency issues (default: true)

parameter.name: url
parameter.documentation: Optionally provides one ore more relative search parameter URLs (e.g. "Patient?active=true" or "Observation?") that will be reindexed. Note that the URL applies to the resources as they are currently indexed, so you should not use a search parameter that needs reindexing in the URL or some resources may be missed. If no URLs are provided, all resources of all types will be reindexed.

parameter.name: reindexSearchParameters
parameter.documentation: Should search parameters be reindexed (default: ALL)

parameter.name: optimizeStorage
parameter.documentation: Should we attempt to optimize storage for resources (default: NONE)

parameter.name: optimisticLock
parameter.documentation: Should we attempt to optimistically lock resources being reindexed in order to avoid concurrency issues (default: true)
